description: Creates a 3D line as the intersection of two planes, given as two comma-separated Cartesian equations.
utility: Create a 3D line from two-plane intersection

arguments.name: equations
arguments.description: Two comma-separated plane equations - e.g., "x + y + z = 3, 2x - y + z = 1"

alternates.description: Line defined by intersection of two planes

examples.scenario: Line from intersection of two planes
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = cartesianline3d(G, "x + y + z = 3, 2x - y + z = 1")

examples.scenario: Line from coordinate plane intersections with color
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = cartesianline3d(G, "x + y = 2, y + z = 3", c(red))
